arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Exclusive: Man Utd, Arsenal, Liverpool Eye £60m 'Future Superstar'
arts.sum: GIVEMESPORT senior correspondent Fabrizio Romano reveals Manchester United, Arsenal and Liverpool are looking at signing a £60m 'future superstar'.

arts.ttl: Arsenal on standby as Mohamed Salah twist threatens to shake up Liverpool Premier League title race
arts.sum: One of those with doubtful futures beyond the season's end is top goal contributor Mohamed Salah, and on the eve of the Reds return to Premier League football, a shock claim has emerged. In a fresh report from The Telegraph, it is explained how Salah - who is eligible to negotiate a pre-contract with foreign clubs - is giving priority to staying with Liverpool beyond the end of the 2024/25 season, though this has still not deterred his suitors in Saudi Arabia.

arts.ttl: Premier League statement released as Arsenal, Chelsea and Tottenham set to discover key dates
arts.sum: Their statement read: "The Premier League 2025/26 season dates have been confirmed, with the opening match round starting on Saturday 16 August 2025. The Premier League have confirmed when the fixtures for the 2025/26 season will be released.

arts.ttl: 'Exceptional': Mikel Arteta says he has been really surprised by two Arsenal players this season
Arsenal vs Fulham – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal are back in competitive action this evening as they host London rivals Fulham in the Premier League. The Gunners approach the final portion of the campaign residing in second place in the table. Mikel Arteta has received a huge boost personnel-wise, with Bukayo Saka recovering from a significant hamstring injury. arts.ttl: Will Bukayo Saka be Available vs. Fulham?
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka is pushing to make his return to the Arsenal lineup on Tuesday, Apr. 1 against Fulham in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Chelsea 'willing to submit' offers up to €40m for Barcelona midfielder this summer
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea are reportedly preparing bids up to £33.4m for Barcelona and Spain youngster Marc Casado, who has fallen down the pecking order in Catalonia.

arts.ttl: Bayern set timeframe for decision on Sané's future amid Arsenal links
arts.sum: Bayern Munich have reportedly set a deadline for a decision on Leroy Sane's future, with Arsenal thought to be ready to capitalize if the winger's contract isn't renewed.
